title: poa laxiflora
intro: Poa laxiflora, also known as the spreading meadow-grass or lax-flowered meadow-grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa laxiflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Poa laxiflora is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with herbal preparations often using the plant's leaves and stems.
